title: Über die Schönheit häßlicher Bilder. Ein Vademecum für Romantiker unserer Zeit
summaries: "Über die Schönheit häßlicher Bilder. Ein Vademecum für Romantiker unserer Zeit" by Max Brod is a collection of 33 essays published in 1913. The work explores nearly every aspect of modern culture through a spirit of "cheerful dilettantism," avoiding expert pretension. Written in an improvisational style, these essays address the independent wanderer, the flâneur who strolls through contemporary life. Brod embraces accessibility over expertise, creating a guide for romantics navigating the cultural landscape of their time. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
